note: First eval-harness release. Held-out: MSF3 (1054 paths) + CredData (1500 records).
9 new credential-format extractors + OOXML traversal + eval-gate CI workflow. Harness numbers unchanged by design (MSF3 has no content; CredData lacks new cred types).
4 new structured parsers (wp-config.php, AWS CLI creds, .netrc, Maven settings.xml) + harness history tracking + artifact upload. Same dynamic — new parsers don't fire on held-out sets.
4 more structured parsers (.pypirc, gcloud user creds, gh CLI hosts.yml, Python keyring) + harness trajectory visualisation + CI gate YAML fix. Parser count 22 → 26.

4 read-only HTTP verifiers (Stripe, SendGrid, Mailgun, Twilio) + PuTTY .ppk parser. 4th held-out set explicitly deferred — disk audit showed candidates are single-class or overfit-risk; faking one would defeat the discipline.
